_readme: Type B — SINGLE SOURCE feature registry. ONE map: feature -> context predicate -> mechanism. It drives (a) the engine fit list / mechanism gate (src/scripts/sensitivity-engine.cjs), (b) the design-matrix build (src/scripts/build-designmatrix.cjs), and (c) the endpoint 'active today' map (src/pages/api/insight/reactions-today.ts). Adding/removing a factor happens HERE, once — never in two lists. `predicate` is a SQL boolean over mart.fct_location_context_daily; the build emits CAST(predicate AS INT64) AS <key>, the endpoint uses it verbatim as the today-activation check. `mechanism` is the theory-constrained tag (gate 1). `fit_type` is binary today; graded/continuous features arrive in A3. `stage` documents when a feature becomes a real regressor (A2 = live binary now; A3 = graded/continuous, wired with engine support). Deferral of low-contrast factors is NOT done here — the engine's N/contrast/variance gates defer them dynamically (tier-not-gate: by identifiability, never a hardcoded status). `note` records the observed 81-day reality only as documentation.

revenue.note: active where contrast exists (Occitanie); Paris ~0 hot days -> scoped out by the SE
sparse (~14 on-days) -> typically dropped on the contrast gate at 81 days
0 contrast in the summer window -> deferred by the variance gate
thin (~4 on-days) -> deferred by the contrast gate
0 contrast in the summer window -> deferred by the variance gate
0 contrast in the window -> deferred by the variance gate
PLACEHOLDER (inert 0), preserving the frozen matrix. Its honest form is the CONTINUOUS event_count_region regressor, wired in A3 with graded-feature engine support. Not a live binary.
